## Summary
- What changed?
- Why?

## Product invariant
- What binding product rule does this PR implement or protect?

## Source of truth
- What real data source or runtime surface was used?
- If demo/model data was used anywhere, where and why?

## Verification
- [ ] Focused tests passed
- [ ] Adjacent tests passed
- [ ] Runtime proof captured when required
- [ ] SonarQube Cloud passes
- [ ] Semgrep passes

## Risk / notes
- What did you intentionally not touch?
- What follow-up is still needed?
